title: SKILL.md Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter block of a VectorHawk SKILL.md file.

name.description: Unique skill identifier. Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens; must start and end with alphanumeric.

description.description: Short human-readable description shown in the registry and MCP tool list.

license.description: SPDX license identifier (e.g. Apache-2.0, MIT). Defaults to Apache-2.0 if omitted.

vh_version.description: Semantic version of the skill (semver 2.0). Defaults to 0.1.0 if omitted.

vh_publisher.description: Publisher identifier. Must match an authenticated account in the registry.

network.description: Network access level. 'none' = no outbound connections; 'restricted' = allow-listed hosts only; 'full' = unrestricted.

timeout_ms.description: Maximum wall-clock time for a single skill run in milliseconds.

sandbox.description: Sandbox enforcement profile. 'strict' = deny-by-default; 'relaxed' = allow common syscalls; 'unrestricted' = no sandboxing.

vh_triggers.description: Natural-language trigger phrases used by the MCP dispatcher to route requests to this skill.

vh_workflow_ref.description: Relative path to an external workflow.yaml file. Mutually exclusive with vh_workflow.

vh_workflow.description: Inline workflow definition. Mutually exclusive with vh_workflow_ref.

provider.description: Model provider. 'ollama' uses local Ollama; 'mcp-sampling' delegates to the MCP client.

min_context_tokens.description: Minimum context window required. Installer will warn if the selected model is smaller.

input.description: Relative path to the JSON Schema file for skill input validation.

output.description: Relative path to the JSON Schema file for skill output validation.
